title: taraxacum atlanticum
intro: Taraxacum atlanticum, commonly known as the Atlantic dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and digestive issues, due to its high levels of inulin, a prebiotic fiber. The health benefits of Taraxacum atlanticum include its ability to support the gut microbiome, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum atlanticum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
